title: Settings
business_purpose: Define minimal settings screen behavior for organization-level configuration and portal mode.
primary_user_context: An organization admin reviewing baseline settings.
user_goal: Understand available settings and deferred backend dependencies.
success_outcome: Settings scope and constraints are clear and portal mode has an approved API boundary.

visibility_rules.description: Visible under temporary Phase 1 capability coverage.

record_scope_behavior.description: Settings must remain organization-scoped and never leak across tenants.

data_sources.label: Portal mode
data_sources.description: Reads the organization portal mode setting.

api_routes.description: Read the organization portal mode setting.
Update the organization portal mode setting.

required_entities.purpose: Render organization settings once approved APIs are available.

empty_data_behavior.title: No data yet
empty_data_behavior.message: No records are available yet for this screen.

empty_state.title: Nothing to show
empty_state.message: There is nothing to show yet.

loading_state.title: Loading
loading_state.message: Please wait while this screen loads.

error_state.title: Something went wrong
error_state.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact support.

permission_denied_state.title: Access denied
permission_denied_state.message: You do not have permission to open this screen.

forbidden_behaviors: No fake data may be shown in this screen.
No placeholder actions may be presented to users.
No hardcoded roles, units, or campuses are allowed.
No cross-organization data exposure is allowed.
No out-of-scope frontend or backend behavior may be implemented from this contract alone.
Do not add a broad settings framework beyond approved portal mode APIs.
Do not add builder editor behavior from this contract.
